required.title: PWA Application Required
required.description: This application is only available as an installed PWA. Please install the application to continue.
required.desktopNotSupportedDescription: This application is designed exclusively for mobile devices (Android and iOS). Please access from your phone or tablet to install and use the application.
required.pwaDescription: A Progressive Web App (PWA) is a modern web application that works like a native app on your device, offering a fast, reliable, and engaging experience.

fast.title: Fast and Efficient
fast.description: Loads instantly and responds quickly to your actions, without long wait times

offline.title: Works Offline
offline.description: Access basic features even when you don't have an internet connection

homescreen.title: Direct Access
homescreen.description: Installs on your home screen like any other app, without needing app stores

secure.title: Secure and Reliable
secure.description: Protects your information with secure connections and automatic updates

chrome.title: Installation on Android
chrome.step1: Look for the three vertical dots icon (⋮) in the top right corner of your Chrome browser
chrome.step2: Tap on the three dots to open the menu
chrome.step3: Find and tap the option that says 'Install app' or 'Add to home screen'
chrome.step4: A confirmation window will appear, tap the 'Install' or 'Add' button
chrome.step5: Done! The app will now appear on your home screen like any other app

safari.title: Installation on iPhone
safari.step1: Look for the share icon at the bottom of the screen
safari.step2: Tap the share icon to open the options menu
safari.step3: Scroll down in the menu (More) until you find 'Add to Home Screen'
safari.step5: You can change the app name if you wish, then tap 'Add' in the top right corner
safari.step6: Done! The app will now appear on your home screen
